name: claude-browser-template
notes: Use only with an account and workspace where you are authorized to test.
Run with --headed first and log in manually. The persistent profile stores the browser session locally.
Claude web selectors can change. Inspect the input box, send button, and response message container if this template times out.
Keep send_documents_inline true for general Claude web testing because Claude web will not know about local YAML documents unless they are pasted or uploaded.
